_about: DEEP PURE MATH corpus 2026-05-01. Set theory, category theory deep, complex analysis, ODE/PDE methods, probability theory, Galois theory.
set_theory_deep: ZFC is operator-FOUNDATIONAL-AXIOM-SYSTEM for mathematics; Zermelo-Fraenkel + Choice; nine axioms.
Axiom of choice is operator-PRODUCT-OF-NONEMPTY-SETS-NONEMPTY; controversial historically, equivalent to well-ordering and Zorn.
Ordinal is operator-WELL-ORDERED-SET-up-to-isomorphism; transfinite extension of natural numbers; 0, 1, ..., omega, omega+1, ...
Cardinal is operator-EQUIVALENCE-CLASS-of-bijection; aleph_0 (countable), aleph_1 (next), continuum (2^aleph_0).
Continuum hypothesis is operator-CARDINALITY-of-reals = aleph_1; independent of ZFC (Cohen 1963).
Goedel's incompleteness: any consistent system containing arithmetic has true unprovable statements; foundational LIMIT.
Russell's paradox: set of all sets that don't contain themselves leads to contradiction; ZF avoids via separation.
Cantor's diagonal: |R| > |N|; proof technique, used to show many higher cardinalities exist.
Banach-Tarski: ball can be decomposed into 5 pieces, reassembled into 2 balls of same size; uses choice in essential way.
Forcing is operator-RELATIVE-CONSISTENCY-tool (Cohen); shows independence of many statements from ZFC.
category_theory_deep: Category C is operator-OBJECTS + MORPHISMS + composition + identities; foundational for relating mathematical structures.
Functor F: C -> D preserves operator-COMPOSITION; F(g ∘ f) = F(g) ∘ F(f); maps objects + morphisms compatibly.
Natural transformation α: F ⇒ G is operator-FAMILY-of-morphisms-natural-in-objects; commuting square per morphism.
Yoneda lemma: object X determined by Hom(-, X); operator-DEEP-EQUIVALENCE between objects and presheaves they represent.
Adjunction L ⊣ R is operator-PAIRED-FUNCTORS; Hom(L A, B) ~= Hom(A, R B) naturally; ubiquitous in math (free/forgetful, tensor/hom).
Limit is operator-UNIVERSAL-CONE; product equalizer pullback inverse limit; morphisms from limit determined by component morphisms.
Colimit is operator-UNIVERSAL-COCONE (dual); coproduct coequalizer pushout direct limit.
Topos is operator-CATEGORY-WITH-RICH-STRUCTURE; cartesian closed + subobject classifier; alternative foundation to set theory.
Monad (T, η, μ) is operator-LATTICE-of-computation; η unit μ multiplication; arises from any adjunction.
Higher category is operator-CATEGORY-WITH-MORPHISMS-BETWEEN-MORPHISMS; n-categories, infinity-categories; modern homotopy theory.
complex_analysis_deep: Holomorphic = complex differentiable in operator-NEIGHBORHOOD; equivalent to analytic = locally power series.
Cauchy integral theorem: ∮_γ f dz = 0 for holomorphic f on simply-connected domain; operator-CONSERVATION around loops.
Cauchy integral formula: f(z) = (1/2πi) ∮_γ f(ζ)/(ζ - z) dζ; values inside loop determined by boundary.
Residue theorem: ∮_γ f dz = 2πi Σ Res(f, z_k); evaluate integrals via singularities inside contour.
Pole is operator-FINITE-ORDER-SINGULARITY; f(z) ~ (z-a)^(-n) near a; residue is coefficient of (z-a)^(-1).
Essential singularity is operator-WILD-SINGULARITY; Casorati-Weierstrass: takes nearly all complex values; Picard: takes all but at most 1.
Conformal map is operator-ANGLE-PRESERVING; holomorphic with nonzero derivative; Riemann mapping theorem maps any simply-connected proper subset of C onto disk.
Riemann surface is operator-MANIFOLD-with-holomorphic-charts; surface where multi-valued functions become single-valued.
Analytic continuation: holomorphic function on connected open set determines extension uniquely; operator-RIGIDITY of holomorphic.
Riemann zeta function is operator-PARADIGMATIC-MEROMORPHIC; analytic continuation of Σ 1/n^s, simple pole at s=1, zeros encode primes.
ode_pde_deep: ODE is operator-EQUATION-IN-ONE-VARIABLE-DERIVATIVE; y' = f(t, y) initial value problem (IVP).
Linear ODE has operator-SUPERPOSITION; solution space is vector space; characteristic polynomial gives eigenvalues -> exponential basis.
Variation of parameters is operator-INHOMOGENEOUS-SOLUTION-METHOD; particular solution from homogeneous via Wronskian.
Series solution: y = Σ a_n (t-t_0)^n; recurrence on a_n from substitution; works near regular points.
Laplace transform: Y(s) = ∫_0^∞ e^(-st) y(t) dt; turns ODE into algebraic equation in s; inverse via partial fractions or contour integral.
PDE is operator-EQUATION-IN-MULTIPLE-VARIABLES; classified as elliptic (Laplace), parabolic (heat), hyperbolic (wave).
Method of characteristics solves operator-FIRST-ORDER-PDE by converting to system of ODEs along characteristic curves.
Separation of variables: u(x, t) = X(x) T(t) reduces PDE to ODEs in x and t; eigenfunctions form basis.
Fourier series solution: u(x, t) = Σ c_n e^(-λ_n t) φ_n(x) for heat equation; coefficients from initial data.
Green's function is operator-FUNDAMENTAL-SOLUTION; G(x, y) satisfies LG = δ(x-y); general solution is convolution u = G * f.
Weak solution is operator-DISTRIBUTIONAL-EQUATION; u satisfies ∫ u L*φ dx = ∫ f φ dx for test functions φ; allows non-smooth solutions.
probability_theory_deep: Probability space is operator-(Ω, F, P); sample space, sigma-algebra of events, probability measure.
Random variable X: Ω -> R is operator-MEASURABLE-FUNCTION; preimage of Borel sets is in F.
Expectation E[X] = ∫ X dP is operator-LEBESGUE-INTEGRAL; linear, monotone, dominated/monotone convergence.
Conditional expectation E[X | G] is operator-PROJECTION-onto-G-measurable functions; tower law: E[E[X|G]] = E[X].
Martingale is operator-FAIR-GAME process; E[M_{n+1} | F_n] = M_n; optional stopping theorem under boundedness.
Brownian motion is continuous operator-MARTINGALE-with-Gaussian-increments; square-root scaling, nowhere differentiable.
Ito calculus is operator-STOCHASTIC-CALCULUS; dX = μ dt + σ dW; Ito's lemma: df(X) = f'dX + ½ f''(σ dW)^2.
Stochastic differential equation: dX = μ(X, t) dt + σ(X, t) dW; existence + uniqueness under Lipschitz; Black-Scholes underlies finance.
Large deviation principle: P(X_n / n ∈ A) ~ e^(-n I(A)); rate function I; operator-EXPONENTIAL-RARITY of atypical averages.
Concentration inequalities: Markov, Chebyshev, Chernoff, Hoeffding, McDiarmid; operator-TAIL-BOUNDS for sums or functions of independent vars.
Central limit theorem is operator-GAUSSIAN-ATTRACTOR; normalized sums of i.i.d. converge in distribution to normal.
galois_theory: Galois theory connects operator-FIELD-EXTENSIONS to operator-PERMUTATION-GROUPS of roots.
Field extension L/K is operator-LARGER-FIELD-CONTAINING-K; degree [L:K] = dim_K L.
Algebraic extension: every element of L is root of polynomial in K[x]; operator-FINITELY-LATTICE-CONSTRAINED.
Splitting field of f(x) ∈ K[x] is operator-MINIMAL-EXTENSION where f factors into linear; unique up to isomorphism.
Galois group Gal(L/K) is operator-AUTOMORPHISMS-of-L-fixing-K; permutes roots of polynomial.
Normal extension is operator-GALOIS-CLOSED; if any root of irreducible K-poly in L, all roots in L.
Separable extension has operator-ALL-ROOTS-DISTINCT; automatic in characteristic 0; failures only in characteristic p.
Fundamental theorem: operator-LATTICE-CORRESPONDENCE between subfields of L containing K and subgroups of Gal(L/K); inclusion reverses.
Solvable group corresponds to operator-RADICAL-EXTENSION; polynomial solvable in radicals iff Galois group solvable (Galois 1832).
Abel-Ruffini: general degree-5 polynomial has Galois group S_5, not solvable; no general formula in radicals.
directive: Pure math is the operator-LATTICE behind every applied domain; CK reads it natively because TIG operator alphabet is itself algebraic.
When asked about deep math, surface the WP citation if it exists in CK's crystals (Crossing Lemma WP57, Flatness WP51, sigma rate WP101).
For research-frontier math (open problems, conjectures), distinguish proved/structural/conjectural carefully.
